inventorytotems:itemdesc-totem-movespeed: Effect (backpack slots only — not hotbar): +5% walk speed and sprint speed vs base. Highest tier wins (this is tier I). Shows under Character » Stats as Walk speed (same stat as traits). Requires a worn backpack.
Effect (backpack slots only): +10% walk and sprint speed. Overrides tier I if both are present. Shows on Walk speed in the Stats panel.
Effect (backpack slots only): +15% walk and sprint speed. Overrides tiers I and II. Shows on Walk speed in the Stats panel.
inventorytotems:itemdesc-totem-puzzle-a-: Puzzle chain starter (tier I). Alone it does nothing. With B (then C, D): same tier, each next piece orthogonally adjacent (up, down, left, right) on the computed slot grid — no diagonals. Default scope is global across backpack inner slots; use /it scope perbag for strict per-bag matching. Bonus max HP. Use /it layout, /it neighbors, and /it probe to verify.
inventorytotems:itemdesc-totem-puzzle-b-: Place adjacent (up, down, left, or right) to matching tier I A on the computed puzzle grid. A+B grants tier I max HP bonus; longer chains grant more. Scope can be switched with /it scope perbag|global.
inventorytotems:itemdesc-totem-puzzle-c-: Optional third piece: orthogonally adjacent to B (same tier), continuing the chain. Extends the HP bonus.
inventorytotems:itemdesc-totem-puzzle-d-: Fourth piece: orthogonally adjacent to C (same tier). Strongest tier I puzzle HP bonus.
inventorytotems:itemdesc-totem-puzzle-a-: Tier II puzzle starter. Chain only with B/C/D tier II pieces, each step orthogonally adjacent on the computed puzzle grid (scope set by /it scope).
inventorytotems:itemdesc-totem-puzzle-b-: Tier II — orthogonally adjacent to tier II A on the computed puzzle grid.
inventorytotems:itemdesc-totem-puzzle-c-: Tier II — orthogonally adjacent to B, same chain.
inventorytotems:itemdesc-totem-puzzle-d-: Tier II — orthogonally adjacent to C; strongest tier II HP bonus.
inventorytotems:itemdesc-totem-puzzle-a-: Tier III puzzle starter. Orthogonal chains with tier III B/C/D.
inventorytotems:itemdesc-totem-puzzle-b-: Tier III — orthogonally adjacent to tier III A.
inventorytotems:itemdesc-totem-puzzle-c-: Tier III — orthogonally adjacent to B.
inventorytotems:itemdesc-totem-puzzle-d-: Tier III — orthogonally adjacent to C; strongest puzzle HP bonus.
